# Expected Hidden Assumptions: Desk Lamp Prototype

- "Helps people focus" can be represented by light temperature, brightness, or
  routine cues.
- A prototype can be built safely without full certification.
- Premium and affordable have shared target costs and materials.
- The companion experience is an app, printed guide, or on-device control.
- Customer testing may happen before manufacturing, safety, or compliance review
  is complete.
- The plan may ignore supply chain, electrical safety, and accessibility details
  unless asked.
